title: Multiply by tens word problems
description: Solve word problems with multiples of ten.  Decompose multiples of ten to multiply.

assessment_items.question_content:
Shreya has $40$ pairs of shoes stacked in boxes.

**If a pair is $2$ shoes, how many shoes does Shreya have?**

[[☃ input-number 1]] shoes
hints:
$\green{40}$ boxes is the same as $\green{4\text{ groups of ten}}$ boxes.

There are $\red2$ shoes in each box.

Total number of shoes:  
$\begin{align}&\red2\times\green{4\text{ groups of ten}}\\
=&\purple{8\text{ groups of ten}}\\
=&\purple{80}\end{align}$
Shreya has $\purple{80}$ shoes.

assessment_items.question_content:
Part of the castle needs repairs. $8$ walls need to be rebuilt, and $60$ bricks are needed for each wall.

**How many bricks are needed in all?**

[[☃ input-number 1]] bricks
hints:
$\red{60}$ bricks is the same as  $\red{6\text{ groups of ten}}$ bricks.

There are $\blue8$ walls.

Total number of bricks:  
$\begin{align}&\blue8\times\red{6\text{ groups of ten}}\\
=&\purple{48\text{ groups of ten}}\\
=&\purple{480}\end{align}$
$\purple{480}$ bricks are needed.

assessment_items.question_content:
Adi has $70$ pairs of shoes stacked in boxes.

**If a pair is $2$ shoes, how many shoes does Adi have?**

[[☃ input-number 1]] shoes
hints:
$\green{70}$ boxes is the same as $\green{7\text{ groups of ten}}$ boxes.

There are $\red2$ shoes in each box.

Total number of shoes:  
$\begin{align}&\red2\times\green{7\text{ groups of ten}}\\
=&\purple{14\text{ groups of ten}}\\
=&\purple{140}\end{align}$
Adi has $\purple{140}$ shoes.

assessment_items.question_content:
A volunteer group is planting trees at $6$ different parks. They planted $70$ trees at each park.

**How many trees did the group plant in all?**

[[☃ input-number 1]] trees
hints:
$\green{70}$ trees is the same as $\green{7\text{ groups of ten}}$ trees.

There are $\red6$ parks.

Total number of trees:  
$\begin{align}&\red6\times\green{7\text{ groups of ten}}\\
=&\purple{42\text{ groups of ten}}\\
=&\purple{420}\end{align}$
The group planted $\purple{420}$ trees.

assessment_items.question_content:
An orchestra played $7$ concerts in a concert hall. $80$ tickets were sold for each concert.

**How many tickets were sold in all?**

[[☃ input-number 1]] tickets
hints:
$\green{80}$ tickets is the same as $\green{8\text{ groups of ten}}$ tickets.

There were $\red7$ concerts.

Total number of tickets sold:  
$\begin{align}&\red7\times\green{8\text{ groups of ten}}\\
=&\purple{56\text{ groups of ten}}\\
=&\purple{560}\end{align}$
$\purple{560}$ tickets were sold in all.

assessment_items.question_content:
A volunteer group is planting trees at $5$ different parks. They planted $90$ trees at each park.

**How many trees did the group plant in all?**

[[☃ input-number 1]] trees
hints:
$\green{90}$ trees is the same as $\green{9\text{ groups of ten}}$ trees.

There are $\red5$ parks.

Total number of trees:  
$\begin{align}&\red5\times\green{9\text{ groups of ten}}\\
=&\purple{45\text{ groups of ten}}\\
=&\purple{450}\end{align}$
The group planted $\purple{450}$ trees.

assessment_items.question_content:
Part of the castle needs repairs. $4$ walls need to be rebuilt, and $50$ bricks are needed for each wall.

**How many bricks are needed in all?**

[[☃ input-number 1]] bricks
hints:
$\red{50}$ bricks is the same as $\red{5\text{ groups of ten}}$ bricks.

There are $\blue4$ walls.

Total number of bricks:  
$\begin{align}&\blue4\times\red{5\text{ groups of ten}}\\
=&\purple{20\text{ groups of ten}}\\
=&\purple{200}\end{align}$
$\purple{200}$ bricks are needed.

assessment_items.question_content:
A gardener is planting flowers. He plants $30$ flowers in each garden bed. He plants $9$ garden beds.  


**How many flowers does the gardener plant in all?**

[[☃ input-number 1]] flowers
hints:
$\pink{30}$ flowers is the same as $\pink{3\text{ groups of ten}}$ flowers.

There are $\blue9$ garden beds.

Total number of flowers:  
$\begin{align}&\blue9\times\pink{3\text{ groups of ten}}\\
=&\purple{27\text{ groups of ten}}\\
=&\purple{270}\end{align}$
The gardener planted $\purple{270}$ flowers.

assessment_items.question_content:
A gardener is planting flowers. She plants $80$ flowers in each garden bed. She plants $5$ garden beds.  


**How many flowers does the gardener plant in all?**

[[☃ input-number 1]] flowers
hints:
$\purple{80}$ flowers is the same as $\purple{8\text{ groups of ten}}$ flowers.

There are $\blue5$ garden beds.

Total number of flowers:  
$\begin{align}&\blue5\times\purple{8\text{ groups of ten}}\\
=&\red{40\text{ groups of ten}}\\
=&\red{400}\end{align}$
The gardener planted $\red{400}$ flowers.

assessment_items.question_content:
An orchestra played $6$ concerts in a concert hall. $40$ tickets were sold for each concert.

**How many tickets were sold in all?**

[[☃ input-number 1]] tickets
hints:
$\blue{40}$ tickets is the same as $\blue{4\text{ groups of ten}}$ tickets.

There were $\red6$ concerts.

Total number of tickets sold:  
$\begin{align}&\red6\times\blue{4\text{ groups of ten}}\\
=&\purple{24\text{ groups of ten}}\\
=&\purple{240}\end{align}$
$\purple{240}$ tickets were sold in all.

assessment_items.question_content:
Les has $3$ bills in her wallet. They are each worth $20$ dollars.

**How many dollars does Les have?**

[[☃ input-number 1]] dollars
hints:
$\blueD{20}$ dollars is the same as $\blueD{2\text{ groups of ten}}$ dollars.

There are $\redD3$ bills.

Total number of dollars:  

$\begin{align}&\phantom{=}\redD3\times\blueD{2\text{ groups of ten}}\\\\
&= \purpleC{ 6\text{ groups of ten}}\\\\
&= \purpleC{60}\end{align}$
Les has $\purpleC{60}$ dollars.

assessment_items.question_content:
Emily went to soccer practice $6$ times last month.  Each practice is $90$ minutes long.

**How long did Emily spend at soccer practice last month?**

[[☃ input-number 1]] minutes
hints:
$\greenD{90}$ minutes is the same as $\greenD{9\text{ groups of ten}}$.

Emily went to $\redD6$ practices.

Total number of minutes:  

$\begin{align}&\phantom{=}\redD6\times\greenD{9\text{ groups of ten}}\\\\
&=\purpleC{54\text{ groups of ten}}\\\\
&=\purpleC{540}\end{align}$
Emily spent $\purpleC{540}$ minutes at soccer practice last month.
